content: ov mail send rejects recipients in terminal state (completed/zombie) at handleSend in src/commands/mail.ts: opens SessionStore via openSessionStore, looks up the recipient by name, and throws MailError if state is completed/zombie. Recipients with no session row (orchestrator/coordinator/operator roles) fall through and are allowed. Group addresses are unaffected because resolveGroupAddress already filters via getActive() which excludes terminal states. The check sits AFTER the broadcast branch's early-return and BEFORE the single-recipient client.send call, so the existing event-recording, auto-nudge, dispatch-nudge, and merge_ready validation paths are skipped on rejection.
